summary_extracted: Most recent: Q1 2026 reported April 21, 2026. Adjusted EPS $7.23 vs $6.56 estimate — beat by ~10.21%. Full-year guidance raised to $18.25+. Next earnings (Q2 2026): estimated July 10 or July 28, 2026 (sources differ). Q2 EPS estimate: ~$4.84 per MarketBeat.
